DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO, INC.'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS, RESTRAINING ORDER AND TURNOVER ORDER IS GRANTED. THE PROPOSED ORDER NEEDS TO BE REVISED TO STATE ON PAGE 2, SECOND PARAGRAPH, "FOR PURPOSES OF PAYMENT OF THE JUDGMENT IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $14,192.56, PLUS INTEREST AND COSTS UNTIL JUDGMENT IS FULLY SATISFIED OR THIS ORDER IS AMENDED." THE COURT WILL SIGN AN ORDER THAT CONFORMS TO THIS LANGUAGE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE PROTEM: ELIZABETH RILES, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Reasonable Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Feb-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO, INCORPORATED'S MOTION For Reasonable Attorney'S Fees ($4,287.50) is Granted, no opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Over
Off Calendar Feb-20-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO, INC.'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover ORDER IS granted. The proposed order needs to be revised to state on page 2, second paragraph, "for purposes of payment of the Judgment in the total amount of $14,192.56, plus interest and costs until Judgment is fully satisfied or this order is amended." The Court will sign an order that conforms to this language. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge ProTem: Elizabeth Riles, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Continued To Feb-06-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff'S Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Aug-17-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert J. Perkiss, Esq. of Cook Collection Attorneys, Tel. 415.989.4730, for Plaintiff and moving party;
Jon Paul Pinaglia, Tel. 203.931.4690, appearing on his own behalf.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT is Granted. No opposition filed. Mr. Pinaglia's request for additional time to file an opposition was denied by the court. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

Notice Of Applicaiton And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Aug-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO, INC'S NOTICE OF APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT.
No appearances. This matter is to be heard at 9:30 am on the Law & Motion calendar. (302/JPT) Judge Pro Tem: Mark Schreiber; Not reported
